blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
